languages.text: {n}Ярость на лице пилота сменяется паническим ужасом от осознания собственного поведения в присутствии Вольного Торговца. Дрожащей рукой он прикасается к вокс-аугменту на голове.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ярость на лице пилота сменяется паническим ужасом от осознания собственного поведения в присутствии Вольного Торговца. Дрожащей рукой он прикасается к вокс-аугменту на голове.{/n}
traits.speaker: OurCrewPilot

languages.text: {n}The rage on the pilot's face gives way to a look of panic as he realises how he has just behaved in the presence of the Rogue Trader. With a trembling hand, he reaches for the vox-augment on his head.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Ярость на лице пилота сменяется паническим ужасом от осознания собственного поведения в присутствии Вольного Торговца. Дрожащей рукой он прикасается к вокс-аугменту на голове.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The rage on the pilot's face is replaced by a look of panicked terror as he realises how he has just behaved in the presence of a Rogue Trader. With a trembling hand, he reaches for the vox-augment on his head.{/n}

{n}The rage on the pilot's face gives way to a look of panic as he realises how he has just behaved in the presence of the Rogue Trader. With a trembling hand, he reaches for the vox-augment on his head.{/n}

{n}You notice naked fury flicker on the pilot's face, quickly replaced with panic-stricken terror. He makes the sign of the Aquila and warily clambers back inside the shuttle. Seconds later, he re-emerges.{/n} "Lord Captain, the vox-caster survived, but... there's a lot of interference. I don't understand why — everything's working fine. It's as if something is jamming the signal."

{n}The rage on the pilot's face is replaced by a look of panicked terror as he realises how he has just behaved in the presence of a Rogue Trader. With a trembling hand, he reaches for the vox-augment on his head.{/n}

{n}The rage on the pilot's face gives way to a look of panic as he realises how he has just behaved in the presence of the Rogue Trader. With a trembling hand, he reaches for the vox-augment on his head.{/n}

languages.text: {n}パイロットの顔に露わな怒りが一瞬よぎり、すぐに怯え切った恐怖に取って代わられる。彼はアクィラの印を結び、用心深くシャトルの中へよじ登って戻る。数秒後、再び姿を現した。{/n} 「ロード・キャプテン、ヴォックス・キャスターは無事でしたが…雑音がひどい。理由が分かりません――機器自体は正常に動いています。まるで何かが信号を妨害しているかのようです」
languages.original_text: {n}You notice naked fury flicker on the pilot's face, quickly replaced with panic-stricken terror. He makes the sign of the Aquila and warily clambers back inside the shuttle. Seconds later, he re-emerges.{/n} "Lord Captain, the vox-caster survived, but... there's a lot of interference. I don't understand why — everything's working fine. It's as if something is jamming the signal."

traits.locale_text: {n}パイロットの顔に露わな怒りが一瞬よぎり、すぐに怯え切った恐怖に取って代わられる。彼はアクィラの印を結び、用心深くシャトルの中へよじ登って戻る。数秒後、再び姿を現した。{/n} 「ロード・キャプテン、ヴォックス・キャスターは無事でしたが……雑音がひどい。理由が分かりません――機器自体は正常に動いています。まるで何かが信号を妨害しているかのようです。」

languages.text: {n}La colère qui embrasait les traits du pilote cède la place à la panique alors qu'il prend conscience de son comportement déplacé en présence {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande}. D'une main tremblante, il actionne l'augmentation-vox implantée sur son crâne.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The rage on the pilot's face gives way to a look of panic as he realises how he has just behaved in the presence of the Rogue Trader. With a trembling hand, he reaches for the vox-augment on his head.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La colère qui embrasait les traits du pilote cède la place à la panique alors qu'il prend conscience de son comportement déplacé en présence {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande}. D'une main tremblante, il actionne l'augmentation-vox implantée sur son crâne.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Pilotun yüzündeki öfke, Hür Tacir'in huzurunda az önce nasıl davrandığını fark etmesiyle yerini paniğe bırakıyor. Titreyen bir elle başındaki voks ogmentine uzanıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The rage on the pilot's face gives way to a look of panic as he realises how he has just behaved in the presence of the Rogue Trader. With a trembling hand, he reaches for the vox-augment on his head.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Pilotun yüzündeki öfke, Hür Tacir'in huzurunda az önce nasıl davrandığını fark etmesiyle yerini paniğe bırakıyor. Titreyen bir elle başındaki voks ogmentine uzanıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Wut im Gesicht des Piloten weicht blanker Panik, als er erkennt, wie er sich gerade in Gegenwart {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} verhalten hat. Mit zitternder Hand fasst er sich an die Voxaugmentation an seinem Kopf.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The rage on the pilot's face gives way to a look of panic as he realises how he has just behaved in the presence of the Rogue Trader. With a trembling hand, he reaches for the vox-augment on his head.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Wut im Gesicht des Piloten weicht blanker Panik, als er erkennt, wie er sich gerade in Gegenwart {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} verhalten hat. Mit zitternder Hand fasst er sich an die Voxaugmentation an seinem Kopf.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La expresión iracunda del rostro del piloto se convierte en pánico al darse cuenta del modo en que se ha comportado en presencia {mf|del|de la} Comerciante Independiente. Se lleva una mano temblorosa al aumento de voco que tiene implantado en la cabeza.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The rage on the pilot's face gives way to a look of panic as he realises how he has just behaved in the presence of the Rogue Trader. With a trembling hand, he reaches for the vox-augment on his head.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La expresión iracunda del rostro del piloto se convierte en pánico al darse cuenta del modo en que se ha comportado en presencia {mf|del|de la} Comerciante Independiente. Se lleva una mano temblorosa al aumento de voco que tiene implantado en la cabeza.{/n}

languages.text: {n}飞行员脸上的怒意渐渐被恐慌取代，他这才意识到自己刚才在行商浪人面前是什么态度。他颤抖着伸手去够头上的音阵植入物。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The rage on the pilot's face gives way to a look of panic as he realises how he has just behaved in the presence of the Rogue Trader. With a trembling hand, he reaches for the vox-augment on his head.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}飞行员脸上的怒意渐渐被恐慌取代，他这才意识到自己刚才在行商浪人面前是什么态度。他颤抖着伸手去够头上的音阵植入物。{/n}
